corporate.author: Priscilla Perkins
corporate.content_full: Accounting Aid Society recently had the pleasure of hosting our annual Celebration Event at the Roostertail in Detroit, Michigan, and we cannot say enough about the fantastic experience we had with the Roostertail staff. Led by owner Mike Schoenith and Director of Events and Sales Nicole Spicuzza, this team exceeded our expectations in every way.Our event was held in the stunning Marine Room at sunset, and the backdrop of the Detroit River added a touch of magic to our evening. The setting was nothing short of breathtaking, and it provided the perfect ambiance for our celebration.One of the standout features of our event was the food provided by the Roostertail. The appetizers and entree (Stuffed Chicken with Boursin Cheese) were not only delicious but beautifully presented. Our guests raved about the culinary delights served at our event. The Roostertail's catering team exceeded our expectations.What truly set the Roostertail apart, however, was the exceptional service provided by their staff. From the moment we began planning our event, the Roostertail team demonstrated a level of attentiveness and dedication that went above and beyond. They worked tirelessly to ensure that our vision for the event became a reality.We were consistently impressed with the professionalism, kindness, and efficiency displayed by the entire Roostertail staff. From the planning stages to the execution of the event, they made the entire process seamless and enjoyable.We extend our heartfelt thanks to Mike Schoenith, Nicole Spicuzza, and the entire Roostertail team for making our event a resounding success. Your dedication and expertise have left a lasting impression on our organization, and we eagerly anticipate future collaborations. Thank you for helping us create a memorable and meaningful evening for our clients and supporters.

corporate.author: David Boze
corporate.content_full: The 17 piece 'Big Band' I play in (The Stardusters) recently played at an event at the Roostertail. We were treated so very well, I was compelled to write to thank the Event Coordinator, Ms. Nicole D'Onofrio. My letter should give an idea of the professionalism of this fine venue. Here is a copy of what I sent Nicole:-----Nicole:On behalf of the Stardusters Big Band, we wanted to send a very hearty THANK YOU to you, Michael, and the ENTIRE STAFF of the Roostertail for a wonderful evening Saturday.Everyone at your facility was the epitome of professionalism, including all the fine workers who got us chairs, the stage set, and helped with tear-down. A nicer harder working bunch you'll never find. And everyone was SO FRIENDLY and helpful.What a beautiful facility, this was the first time playing there for most of us. Growing up listening to WJR from the early 60's, I always remembered how personalities like J.P. McCarthy of WJR would tell of wonderful evenings there. Now I know why.It is due to you and your staff. We hope you enjoyed some of our music but I know you all were working and had to stay focused on that. We all so enjoyed working with you and the entire event staff.Once again, thank you for a great evening. Successful things only happen due to great leadership and teamwork. You have all of that!Dave BozeStardusters Big Band

corporate.content_full: My high school class just had their 30th reunion at the Roostertail, and I cannot say enough wonderful things about the night. As a part of the planning committee, we had spent a number of months trying to decide on a location for our event. Michael Schoenith (who happens to be a member of our class), gladly offered to host the reunion at the Roostertail. Once he was involved, that was it. From managing the invitations, guest list, music, decorations, food, beverages, and ambiance, every detail was over the top. The decor was outstanding--our class colors and creative displays of iconic 80s movies greeted us at entry. The staff was welcoming, friendly, and helpful. I've never seen food stations so creatively arranged. The quality of the food was top notch. There was plenty of room to mingle, dance, or just talk. The views, of course, were out of this world. Thank you, Schoenith family and all of your Roostertail staff. You managed to out-do our prom!

holiday.author: Suzanne Parrish
holiday.content_full: Another spectacular Echo Global Logistcs 2024 Holiday Party last weekend! Once again The Roostertail created a magical evening for us! Nicole Spicuzza, Mike Schoenith and Mr. Schoenith made sure every detail was thought out and created to what our needs were. We love being a part of The Roostertail family, thank you once again for a memorable evening! ❤️Our company, Echo Global Logistics had our "After The Holiday's Holiday Party there on January 12, 2024. It was absolutely spectacular! It was decorated so beautiful, it was a Winter Wonderland with special touches around every corner! Nicole and her team were on top of everything and treated us all like royalty, literally, what an amazing staff they have! The food was so delicious, everyone loved the selection of food stations that we chose, the hit of the night was the Chicken/Steak Fajita Station and the Soul Food Station! Again they went above and beyond with the food and the specialty drinks! We will definitely be having more events there for sure! Thank you so much to Nicole Spicuzza, Mike Schoenith and the staff for making our event so incredible!

holiday.author: Amanda Patterson
holiday.content_full: Ava went above and beyond to help me surprise my godfather. He and his band played an extended gig at the Roostertail back in the 1960's and to this day he speaks of it so fondly.I thought I'd reach out to the Roostertail team and see about getting him some Roostertail merchandise for Christmas, as I knew it would bring a smile to his face. Ava got back to me immediately and helped me realize my dream of surprising him. Not only did she send me the coolest socks to gift him, she was genuinely interested in hearing his story and helping me track down any photos of his band they may have in the archives.I was a complete stranger with a very random request when I emailed Roostertail, and Ava didn't hesitate for a second to help me out. Her genuine interest, proactive efforts, and personal touch made this more than just another gift. This is hospitality at its absolute best. I am so grateful to her and I highly recommend the Roostertail.

prom.author: Jessica Sanchez
prom.content_full: Walled Lake Western High School held their senior prom at The Roostertail earlier this month. The venue is absolutely gorgeous and the students deemed it "Instagram-worthy." So pretty, we didn't need to bring in additional decoration. The students loved the balcony and floor-to-ceiling windows looking over the Detroit River. We also appreciated the secure, private parking lot.Nicole, Director of Sales, was such a joy to work with. She helped us put together a realistic payment plan for a school organization, and always got back to us immediately when we had questions. The venue cut and served the cake we brought in, provided us with easels for our seating charts, and even broke out a few neon signs around the bar area that fit our Motown Nights theme.I hope to return here again the next I am in charge of planning prom! Thank you again for making it a beautiful and memorable evening for everyone!

prom.content_full: We hosted our "In the Clouds" Prom at the Roostertail this year. From start to finish, Nicole worked with our staff every step of the way. She was extremely responsive and truly helped us make this Prom dream a reality for the Class of 2024. On the day of Prom, every single staff member there went above and beyond. They understood our theme and made sure to decorate the event space accordingly...from the blue tablecloths, to the bubbles, to the haze, to the blue and white trees, and hanging ceiling decor, it truly felt like we were in the clouds. The Roostertail blew us away with various surprises throughout the night that made the Prom an unforgettable one. The food, snacks, and desserts were talked about by all the students well after Prom was over. We can't say enough about everyone at Roostertail for making this Prom the best one yet!

Michael Schoenith (who happens to be a member of our class), gladly offered to host the reunion at the Roostertail. Once he was involved, that was it. From managing the invitations, guest list, music, decorations, food, beverages, and ambiance, every detail was over the top. The decor was outstanding--our class colors and creative displays of iconic 80s movies greeted us at entry. The staff was welcoming, friendly, and helpful. I've never seen food stations so creatively arranged. The quality of the food was top notch. There was plenty of room to mingle, dance, or just talk. The views, of course, were out of this world. Thank you, Schoenith family and all of your Roostertail staff. You managed to out-do our prom!

shower.content_full: We just can not begin to thank the team at Roostertail enough for giving us the most pleasant and perfect bridal shower experience. We worked primarily with Nicole at the venue and wow is she the text book definition of a dedicated worker! She always made sure to make us feel like her number one priority and answered every phone call/email no matter what she was doing or what time of the day it was. Nicoles positivity and kindness was contagious! From start to finish she insured our bridal shower was so special and everything we envisioned and more! She made it all happen! It didn’t just end with Nicole the whole team at the Roostertail is unlike any group I’ve ever worked with or have experienced. Everyone was friendly and actually looked happy to be there and doing their job. You can tell just by everyone’s attitude alone how wonderful the environment is! The serving team made sure the guests never went without a drink in hand and the food came out quick and hot! Some of the best food I’ve ever had at any bridal event (we had the stuffed chicken and whipped potatoes on our menu). All of our guests were just blown away with the venue and the team! So much love in this establishment! Hats off to the Roostertail! 10/10

wedding.author: megan schultz
wedding.content_full: My husband and I recently celebrated the most incredible day of our lives at the Roostertail on September 27, 2024. I can confidently say that there is no better venue for a wedding than this one. From my very first inquiry, their team was impressively responsive and accommodating. As soon as we stepped into the venue, we were captivated by the stunning view and the beautifully remodeled reception area. After a delightful conversation and tour with Nicole, we were convinced that this was the perfect place for our wedding! Nicole is such an upbeat, kind soul, she was a factor into why we booked with them! Nicole did go over all price point options that they offered to ensure we were going to have everything we wanted for our big day. Throughout the planning process and on the big day, Nicole and Colleen were exceptional with all things wedding planning. Shawna also played a crucial role in ensuring everything ran smoothly and on schedule. Our guests have been raving about the venue, the breathtaking views, and the delicious food! The wait staff was nothing short of extraordinary and incredibly efficient. I wholeheartedly recommend the Roostertail for your wedding or any special event! Worth every penny! I lived out my princess dreams!

wedding.author: Sarah Crosby
wedding.content_full: Words cannot describe how amazing our evening was at the Roostertail. My husband Parker and I met Nicole Spicuzza a year before our wedding and she greeted us, along with my parents and sisters, at the door with mimosa's on hand. An unforgettable introduction. We were blown away by the initial views of the upstairs Palm River Room that we booked it that same week.The day of our wedding was flawless. May 6th, 2023.We had an outdoor ceremony in which we were given the option to choose indoors or outdoors up until 10am the day of - in case of bad weather. We had great weather and our guests LOVED the riverside dock views. It was an amazing experience walking down the dock into our ceremony, one that I will never forget. Nicole was great about helping us include our dogs during the day - they walked down the dock during the ceremony! And then went back to their Airbnb as we were unable to bring them inside the reception area, which was completely fine! I will never forget the 'Circle of Love' that Nicole put us in at the end of the dock as the recessional finished and our guests were exiting.. the cutest idea ever. All of our wedding party circled around my husband and I to dance and laugh to create a barrier so that guests would not come over and distract from us needed to get family photos after the ceremony. Genius idea.Our reception was held in the Palm River Room and our guests cannot stop talking about how amazing the view was and the overall experience. Nicole and her staff always made sure to have a drink of some sort in mine and my husbands hands all night - they ALSO looked over our immediate families and offered the same hospitality, all night long.We built such a great relationship with Nicole that I text her occasionally to thank her for everything she contributed to our perfect day.We will always be grateful for Nicole, the staff at Roostertail and everything that went into our wedding day.If you're not choosing the Roostertail for your wedding... you're missing out!!!

wedding.author: Danielle Gordon
wedding.content_full: Truly can’t describe how happy we are with our wedding day. We got married just over a week ago, and are still swooning over how perfect it was. Nicole was our coordinator through the planning process and she understood our vision and what we wanted out of our day! Day of, we had Shawna, Ava and Morgan helping make sure our wedding ran smoothly. Those three made it absolutely PERFECT. They were so helpful, approachable, friendly and made us feel so special. Shawna was there for us to fine tune the ceremony, and Ava made sure we had every single thing we needed throughout the reception. Not one request we had went unattended! Our guests RAVED about how delicious the food was, and our vendors were ecstatic that the roostertail served them HOT food (they mentioned that not many venues serve vendors right after the bride and groom, they were so happy!). The service was impeccable and attentive. The ceremony space was gorgeous, and the reception was everything i dreamt of. The only thing I’d say was not perfect was during the reception, guests from the wedding above us kept getting lost and coming into our reception. Not a huge deal because someone was always nearby to redirect them, but if there was anything to improve, that would be the only thing. I cannot say enough great things about the roostertail team.

wedding.content_full: The Roostertail is the most amazing venue! wedding.author: Jenna Beagan
wedding.content_full: As an Event Manager, I had the pleasure managing a wedding at The Roostertail this past Sunday. WOW! From the moment I walked in to do a site visit with Shawna I was thoroughly impressed. (Full Disclosure: this was a pop in, not planned and Shawna dropped everything to show us around. Not only was she helpful, she was incredibly knowledgeable and had a sense of pride that showed through in every word she spoke as she explained some of the history too!) The unique features of the facility, the architecture and the views are just the start. I don't think Shawna or her staff have no in their vocabulary. From the moment I set foot on site for the actual wedding day Shawna and her team (you know who you are) were ON IT! I've never worked with a staff that was so in sync. I am pretty obsessed with customer service in the Event & Food Service industry. I have to be, that is my job! At EVERY turn (even during set up, which they had already set up the items we left), the staff was THERE! I could go on and on and on. The food was spectacular too! Again, the PEOPLE were just FANTASTIC, well trained and HAPPY which is a true testament to GOOD Management. If you are looking for a unique space, great food, great service & location, location, location, CHECK out the Roostertail. Old-school hospitality is still alive at The Roostertail! Thank you to Shawna and her team. Well done. Highly, Highly recommended for anyone planning an event!

wedding.author: Scott Riopelle
wedding.content_full: We just had our wedding here this weekend after 10 months of planning, and I couldn't be happier with the result! We knew this beautiful venue was the right place when we toured last December. Nicole went over our options and raised questions and possibilities we didn't know we needed to plan. She sold us on The Roostertail, and we are thrilled that she did.We got nothing but compliments on the venue, the food (I couldn't believe their signature chicken was just as good as the filet, and I strongly encourage anyone to try the delicious spring rolls), the organization, the elegance, the vibe, and literally every aspect of the wedding. Nicole made sure our vision reached the highest potential it could, and she and the staff made sure our vision was perfectly realized. More importantly, my new wife and I had an absolutely wonderful time along with our guests!I'd be remiss to say that The Roostertail helped to quickly solve the day-of roadbumps, because they didn't even feel like issues. The pre-planning and the quick response by the Roostertail ensured that our late start (due to our own late arrival) didn't derail the evening. We caught back up to the scheduled plan quickly. Rain may have prevented our outdoor ceremony, but the intimacy of the professionally run indoor version was a huge hit with the guests and wedding party.I happily give this venue 5 stars. I couldn't have asked for a better evening for our wedding.

wedding.author: Hannah Teran
wedding.content_full: It’s hard to put into words the gratitude that I feel to the Roostertail for making our day so special. My husband and I got married and had both our ceremony and reception at the Roostertail on 9/23/2023. It couldn’t have been a more beautiful day! The venue is so beautiful, the food was incredible, and the staff is amazing. Plus, the musical history of the Roostertail cannot be beat - one of the first things that had drawn us to the venue! My guests continue to rave about the view, the deliciousness of the food and the great pours! I wanted to give a special shout out to Nicole and Ava. Nicole was our day of venue coordinator, as well as my point of contact throughout my whole wedding planning journey with the Roostertail - she was an absolute dream to work with and any bride would be lucky to have her on their team! She made me and my entire family feel so welcomed and cared for - she went out of her way to attend to my every need the day of my wedding. When she heard that our morning plans fell through with our hotel vendor so I didn’t have a breakfast, she offered up some of her personal snack stash to make sure I wasn’t starving during the ceremony. Ava was so helpful throughout the night to attend to the needs of my family and I. She heard that I liked rum, so she got me a flight of different rums to sample! She truly made me feel so special. The staff here truly cannot be beat, they treat you like family and they go above and beyond. You can feel that this is a family owned business through and through. The Roostertail went above and beyond to make our day the wedding of our dreams. We even got to meet the owners, Tom and Diane, while we were there and they gave us a gift on our way out. This place truly cannot be beat. It is truly special. We can’t wait to be back. We love being a part of the Roostertail family <3.

We waited about 6 hours before we booked with her because we knew!! She told me she would exceed my expectations…….and let me tell you…..she did!! Her attention to detail and true love for her job and desire to make our day one we’d never forget was unparalleled to anything I’ve ever experienced! Not a SINGLE person who attended our wedding did not comment on the fact it was the best wedding they’ve ever been to! Thank you Roostertail for your fantastic venue and thank you Shawna for your love and delivery of an unforgettable day!!! Please…..go see Shawna and book your wedding at the Roostertail ASAP!!!

wedding.content_full: We got married in the Club Room at the Roostertail in October 2021, and everything about our experience with this venue, staff, event planers was PERFECT. Nicole was our day-of coordinator, and she was so helpful over the entire course of wedding planning. That kind of care eliminated so much stress during the planning process...and even on a hectic wedding prep morning, we never doubted everything at the venue was under control & would turn out beautifully.Our wedding was just over 2 months ago now, and we're STILL getting stellar feedback from our guests about how much fun they had, how amazing the food was (we did cocktail style instead of plated sit-down dinner, and it was just *chef's kiss,* and so filling), how attentive/professional/friendly the staff were, and how beautiful the location was.Literally, our wedding day would have gone so differently if we got married anywhere else, so I'm endlessly grateful we made the decision to put our day in the Roostertail team's hands.

The inclusion, expertise, detail-oriented planning, views, lighting, and excellent food makes the venue and your wedding day seamless and perfect! We had endless compliments on the dinner, the mood, the staff, and the flow of the night. Everyone wishes we could re-live the night again and again. The best part about Roostertail is the fact that they have done SO MANY weddings. They know how to make it smooth. For example, we had an open bar, but Roostertail was smart enough to but beer in a cooler in the middle of the cocktail room which significantly cut down the bar line wait time. Little details like this are the reason you go to venues like the Roostertail. Thank you again to Nicole and all the staff who helped make our day perfect!

wedding.content_full: We worked with the Roostertail for 2 years! Nicole was our venue Coordinator, but quickly become so much more; she was a motivator, part therapist for my meltdowns (many) and at some point became sonic the hedgehog to bring all the details together so quickly at the end. No, but seriously, not enough words for the work she did, you would never know she was working with multiple couples at a time; always available via phone, or text, check-in’s via email, active online… she was incredibly attentive to us. After moving the date, constant changes on our end, you would never know the day of.. everything was perfect! The day was so special. We exchanged vows on the side patio, overlooking the water, then entered a beautiful venue, greeted by the staff that took care of us from the beginning, until the very end. Nicole made sure the day flowed, with no hiccups. The food was amazing, my guest are still raving about it. The drinks were top-tier! The venue’s design is so beautiful and pictured well with our photo’s and videos. I can’t say enough how happy I am that we chose the Roostertail, they really care and it showed throughout the 2 years we worked together. Nicole doesn’t forget about you either, she texted me a few days after the wedding, to send videos she captured and I thought that was so sweet, she also sent us a personalized card to our home. She’s the best, Roostertail is happy to have her, but honestly, the entire team is rockstar, the owners even walked the floor and made sure everything was perfect. Thank you, thank you, thank you!

wedding.content_full: Hands down working with Shawna and the Rooster tail was an amazing experience. Our original wedding date was set for 2020, however due to COVID-19 we wanted to push our date back to ensure the safety of our guests. Shawna and the other staff made sure that pushing our date back was not an issue and made it even more special!Prior to our wedding we spoke with another team member that made great menu suggestions for our Dinner that all of our guests loved. We were not able to eat during our event but our food was thoughtfully wrapped and ready for us to take home. The donut wall we had was a nice touch that our guests devoured in minutes.If we had to redo this day, We would have chosen the Roostertail from the beginning and not even deal with another venue. The component that made the experience over the top was working with Shawna. She calmed our nerves and made sure as she stated "Whatever you forgot I remembered" was not a false statement.We are so elated that we were serviced with passion and dedication. If you are second guessing this venue for your wedding or event Don't! You will not be dissatisfied.

wedding.author: Donna Jakubik
wedding.content_full: Our daughter's wedding, originally planned for 10.10.20 in Grosse Pointe was rescheduled during the pandemic for 7.1.21. Sadly, in January of 2021, the venue announced a major renovation and moved all weddings outdoors to a tent. Six days before the wedding, the tent was damaged in a storm, creating the need for a very quick venue change. In stepped the Roostertail, just 3 days before the wedding! From the moment we met Nicole and Michael, they were confident, reassuring, and positive they could create a dream wedding in only a few days. With so little time to make changes and notify guests, we had to trust Nicole and Michael and leave all the details to them. They exceeded our expectations in EVERY POSSIBLE WAY!It is impossible to express the feeling walking into the Roostertail and then watching our daughter and son in law walk into the gorgeous Palm River room, with the absolutely breathtaking view. The entire staff was attentive, professional, and anticipated and met our needs before we even asked! Michael asked my favorite drink when we first met and ordered the malibu to make it, Nicole made sure I had that drink in hand all night long. The food was delicious and beautifully presented and received so many compliments. The owner, Tom Schoenith, even joined and shared stories and memories with our guests. During the evening they added a dry ice drink bar that was such a surprise and a hit with everyone! Guests were absolutely in awe of the Roostertail and their ability to create the night in a matter of days. Their attention to detail was incredible and they appeared to enjoy the night as much as we did. Nicole even created a slideshow of Lauren and Conner from Instagram pictures! Our only regret is that we didn't book the Roostertail from the start as their all inclusive package (food, cocktail hour, appetizers, premium bar, chiavari chairs, linens, table vases, outdoor covered ceremony deck overlooking the water, specialty drinks, and tax and gratuities) would have saved us time booking outside vendors and money.Thank you Nicole, Michael, Tom and all the Roostertail staff for making Lauren and Conner's dream wedding possible and truly better than they ever imagined it would be. 🥰

wedding.author: Bronson Goodsell
wedding.content_full: We had our wedding 6-20-2021, Father’s Day.Bronson and I had a long engagement and searched several other Detroit venues until we found The Roostertail. I'll be honest, we were a little hesitant about it as we ate lunch at Sinbads prior to our appointment with the venue. But, within seconds of walking into the Roostertail we knew immediately this was the place. STUNNING views all around, grand decorations, rising dance floor, and a ceremony location beautifully put outside. Needless to say, we booked! This was all before Covid.Planning for the wedding had its stressful times as Covid presented some unforeseen challenges. The Roostertail was adjusting and adapting by the minute. This meant limited options and a lot of messaging, Zooming, and calling. The last few weeks before our wedding date Bronson and I decided to just give it to the Roostertail and let them do their thing. AND DID THEY!!!We put all of our trust into their recommended food selection of stuffed chicken with boursin cheese and spinach, mashed potatoes with a garlic sauce, green beans and the caesar salad. We never had a food tasting and went unknowingly into our wedding night. Our guests could not stop talking about the food, service, atmosphere, quality, and experience! Several of our guests had previously been to The Roostertail for high school proms or class reunions and had talked very highly of the venue. We knew our night would be magical and full of love with our friends and family. What we did not know was what quality and superior service The Roostertail would give it. Individual tables had personal service and their needs were delivered quickly!Nicole did a very good job as the day of coordinator. She made sure that we were punctual with our timing and we stayed organized to maximize our time with our guests. She made sure that we had everything we needed from a drink in our hand to a pen for our guest book. Our guest made several comments about the service at the Roostertail and how attentive Nicole was. We felt so well taken care of and not a single worry that night. Thank you Roostertail.What was really special about The Roostertail was how well the vendors worked together with Nicole and each other. After giving Nicole their numbers they were able to organize the venue and create the perfect environment and atmosphere for a wedding. This allowed us to focus on the day rather than the little details.The Rustic Root did a PHENOMENAL job with florals and went ABOVE AND BEYOND for us on our day. Lindsey is trustworthy and has such a creative eye! Her and her team created masterpieces for our day!Thank you Lindsay and The Rustic Root!!CCKing has done several events at The Roostertail and was INCREDIBLE with keeping our guests on the dance floor.. didI mention it rises for the first dance?! Tony!! You are the best! Thank you for keeping the party going!!You want to have the best wedding you, your future spouse, and your guest will ever have? Choose The Roostertail as your venue, The Rustic Root for florals, Chocolate Bar cafe for mini desserts, and CC King for DJ. Best day of my life! Thank you ALL!

wedding.content_full: I could never have enough positive things to say about Nicole our wedding coordinator from Roostertail and the ENTIRE Roostertail Staff. Wow. Just wow. First, planning a wedding during a pandemic is one of the most stressful experiences ever. From guidelines constantly changing to guests dropping because of covid to trying to make what should be a normal wedding, somewhat normal of a wedding. The Roostertail staff made all of our guests so comfortable and we were amazed at how well informed and trained they are with the covid protocols.The venue was absolutely stunning, the food was ridiculously good and the drinks were pouring! If I could relive this day over and over again, I would in a heartbeat. The Roostertail Staff made my dreams come true and then some, even when it did not feel like it would ever come together. Even days leading up to the wedding, we were unsure if it was going to be announced that indoor dining would be shut down once again. Nicole always was on top of it and a step ahead with Plan B, C and D!Thank you from the bottom of my heart from the kitchen staff, waitstaff, bartender, Shauna, Erik from GFS, the owner! and Nicole! You all made our day so special and we could never thank you enough.

wedding.author: Nicole Arney
wedding.content_full: We originally booked the Roostertail for our May 30th, 2020 wedding but due to covid, we ultimately had to postpone. Roostertail & Nicole were incredibly accommodating & worked with us as we ultimately decided to postpone our large reception but continue with a small intimate wedding/mini reception on October 23rd, 2020....& we are SO happy we decided to do this!! Nicole was so incredibly helpful, and worked with us to make our dream wedding (for only 13 people!). Up until the wedding date, Nicole was very detail oriented &constantly worked with us to make sure that we felt comfortable & provided great expertise & suggestions! The day of our wedding, we were BLOWN away! The attention to detail & the set up was more than we could have ever dreamed of - everything was so beautiful & they made our intimate wedding feel so incredibly special. The food was fantastic, the decor was stunning, & our families raved about all of that along with the professionalism & helpfulness of the entire staff at Roostertail. Roostertail & staff also adhered to all COVID restrictions, which put us at ease & we all felt incredibly safe the entire time. The staff went above & beyond on a few incidents that happened: 1. We had a torrential downpour/storm almost immediately after the wedding ceremony & were stranded on the deck but they brought out umbrellas/helped us dry off/put coats in dryers, etc!. 2. I spilled an ENTIRE GLASS OF RED WINE on my dress, and the staff immediately assisted me and helped me to get everything out. Overall, we were so incredibly happy with our initmate wedding/reception and with Nicole and the entire staff at Roostertail. Our 13 person event felt so incredibly special & they definitely pulled out all of the stops to make us feel special, including Mr. Schoenith who really assisted in our intimate event! Our intimate wedding day was so incredibly perfect & would not have been possible without Nicole & the staff at Roostertail! We are already so excited for our postponed large reception at the Roostertail!

wedding.author: Jessica Vera
wedding.content_full: My husband & I had our wedding end of September at the Roostertail. We had originally planned for a destination wedding but had to cancel that due to the pandemic. We had to quickly find a venue. My husband had reached out to the staff at Roostertail, specifically Nicole to get a quote. During the stages of choosing a venue, Nicole was the only wedding coordinator that continued to reach out to us, willing to make our vision work with our budget. Once we decided to go with the Roostertail, we had to plan our wedding in 3 months. Nicole did an AMAZING job keeping us up to date on the latest news, how to keep our guest safe & really kept us organized with our wedding planning. She listened to our wishes & made it all happen. We really wanted a tropical style wedding, & she made that dream come to life. With little details such as palm trees next to our sweet heart table on the beautiful gazebo surrounded by water, the food being delicious & matching our theme (kabobs, coconut rice, & a banana pie), the beautiful blue & champagne table linens. It was SUCH a beautiful day & the beauty of the gazebo at the Roostertail enhanced it that much more. So happy we decided to go with the Roostertail. They made our dream “tropical style destination” wedding come true. Forever grateful!!! Would highly recommend. Nicole you were the BEST!!!

wedding.author: Maegan Daughtery
wedding.content_full: When my husband and I signed the contract for the Roostertail, we knew we had picked the best venue!In January of 2019, I contacted the Roostertail and had the honor to speak with Nicole. My fiancée (now husband) and I met with her in February and we discussed the many options and great packages that the Roostertail had to offer. My husband and I, overwhelmed in a positive way, were able to walk away with a contract that we could afford, with all of the “bells and whistles” that we wanted to have! I visited the Roostertail many times from February until our wedding day December 28, for meetings, suggestions, consultations, and brainstorming so that my dream could become a reality. Nicole was always very helpful, had many suggestions, recommendations, ideas, and really took an active interest in helping my husband and I have the wedding of our dreams! She was always available to talk to, and she was always very thorough and positive. Not only was Nicole the perfect person to work with but also was the entire staff. Whenever I entered the building, everyone was helpful, pleasant, and excited for my husband and I about our day.On our wedding day, December 28, 2019, THE ENTIRE STAFF was pleasant, helpful, and accommodating. My guests are still telling us how nice and professional the staff was and how nice the venue was. From coat check, to the buffet, to bathroom attendants, to wait staff, the entire Roostertail staff made my husband and I wedding day one that we will never forget! We enjoyed them so much, we are thinking about the next event we want to have at the Roostertail. I am so glad that we chose to have one of the most important days of our lives at the Roostertail. No other venue compared (we went to many), and no other venue was so accommodating and welcoming! Nicole, we thank you so much for ALL THAT YOU DID FOR US, we will see you soon! Thanks again!Maegan and Aaron Barnes

wedding.author: Paige Crawford
wedding.content_full: Truly a fairytale wedding. My husband and I had our ceremony on the patio and reception in the Palm River room at the Roostertail on 10/05/19. It was perfect from start to finish! The venue was morebeautiful than I could have imagined. Our coordinator Amber was simply AMAZING! Her attention to detail and expertise made our day even more special. From the moment we decided to have our wedding at the Roostertail she was incredible. Amber made us feel like we were the only couple she was working with. She was responsive and always available to answer any questions or ideas we had. My mother and I will miss our visits with Amber at the Roostertail. It truly felt like we were working witha family member or a friend. My husband described Amber as “clutch,” after the groomsmen forgot their boutonnieres at the hotel, Amber and Shawna handmade boutonnieres for them moments before they walked down the aisle. Just when we thought Amber could not get any better, she SURPISRED us during the reception with a customized quesadilla bar. Our guest could not stop talking about how AWESOME the food and service was. Amber and the Roostertial team were FLAWLESS. The owners even stopped by to congratulate Daniel and I and made sure we were enjoying our experience. I would recommend the Roostertail as a wedding venue. They truly create a unique experience for each couple.

wedding.author: John Murray
wedding.content_full: It’s hard to put into words how incredible Nicole and the entire Roostertail team is. Last year, John (my now husband) and I met with Nicole to inquire about having our wedding reception at the Roostertail. When people say they know the moment they walk into a venue, it’s the place for them, this is exactly how John and I felt. After one meeting with Nicole, we knew this was where we wanted to spend one of the most important days of our lives celebrating with our closest family and friends. Before we had anything finalized Nicole created a texting group chat with her, John and I titled, ‘John & Deana NYE 2018 Wedding.’ Seeing something as simple as this made us so excited and we felt so special. From our first encounter with Nicole we felt truly cared about and we loved that she was just as excited as we were. We said YES to the Roostertail. This was one of the easiest and best decisions we have ever made.Throughout the entire planning process, Nicole was always there to answer phone calls, text messages, and emails promptly. I can honestly say, I did not have any worries and/or anxiety about the wedding because I trusted her 100%. I enjoyed the most important day in my life, worry-free because of Nicole. I know not every bride can say that. Nicole and the entire Roostertail team were flawless. They included several surprises the night of our wedding, which we are forever grateful for. The food was delicious, the drinks were perfect, and all the staff members were extremely accommodating. The owner of the Roostertail was on sight the night of our wedding and personally came over to John and I congratulating us, making sure we were good. Remarkable customer service! We have received endless compliments about the evening from our guests. Our New Year’s Eve wedding was so magical, something out of a movie! I honestly could not imagine planning our wedding without Nicole and recommend her and the Roostertail team with no reservations. We look forward to attending future Roostertail events!

wedding.author: Dawood Boutique
wedding.content_full: After recently having our wedding here, we would highly recommend the Roostertail for anyone who is looking to book a venue for any upcoming occasion. Not only did the staff greatly accommodate each guest, but the atmosphere is one that can not be found anywhere in Metro Detroit. It is definitely a hidden gem. Having our cocktail hour directly on the Detroit river is what has left our guests raving. As the sun went down, the fountain, which is located in the back of the Roostertail over looking the River, was going off and lighting up the back of the venue. This enhanced the already stunning venue in which we were spending our most special day. They bend over backwards to accommodate your every need. My husband and I interviewed all five star venues in the Metro Detroit area, and we settled on the Roostertail because there was not one thing they would not accommodate for us. There was no "no' in their vocabulary. You name it, the Roostertail provides it. They take pride in specializing each event to your individual taste. Thank you to Shawna, the Roostertail manager, Tom and Diane, the owners, for far exceeding our expectations on our special day.Be sure to contact them! The Roostertail is the most beautiful and refreshing venue to leave both you and your guests beaming.Side note- every attendee at our wedding has not stopped raving and has mentioned that they can not wait to go back to the Roostertail.This is all from my heart, and I am an extremely tough critic.I can't wait to have our next special occasion there!!!!! We could not go anywhere else.

wedding.content_full: Shawna is absolutely the best planner I have ever had in any part of my life. If you plan on having your wedding here ask for Shauna and tell her Tiffany sent you!!!!! I promise you I will put my name on it you will be amazed.She can make the impossible happen! So I ordered a custom wedding cake from New York and it was Delivered... The only problem is that the cake delivery person was an 2 hours late!!!! Think of how furious i was i made bridzilla look like a angel....so I couldn't even do pictures of the cake cutting till the very end when my guests started to leave but Shawna had a plan B already she told me not to worry she has a huge sheet cake in the back and she can have them cut it and serve the gust on fancy platters with beautiful strawberry garnishes!!!! Whaaa....My $700 cake arrived at the end and I had 2 kinds of cakes :) thank you so much Shauna you are a great friend now to me I will never forget how much she did for my day.

I cried so hard when I first saw the room and all the amazing little details they used to set up the whole venue. Shawna is so sweet and amazing to work with. She made planning the wedding so much less work and had so many little surprises at our wedding that made the day even more fun! Hands down best place to get married in Detroit!

Thank you to everyone at the Roostertail for making our wedding dreams come true. Future brides and grooms book here you won’t be disappointed!

wedding.author: Leslie Ford
wedding.content_full: If you're thinking of having your wedding/reception at the Roostertail...do it! My husband and I got married there in May and it was absolutely perfect. The staff was so organized, welcoming, and helpful, and they made the planning process easy for us from start to finish. One huge perk about this venue is that their packages include everything (food, drinks, chairs, linens, etc.) and they even had a boxwood wall for rent that provided some great photo ops. Views of the river from the ceremony and reception (Palm River Room and deck) were gorgeous and look beautiful in our photos. Many of our guests also commented that the food was delicious. We want to give a huge shout out to Nicole for being an MVP on our big day! She made sure everything ran smoothly and worked side-by-side with our day of wedding planner to ensure our wedding day was just how we envisioned. I can't say enough good things about the Roostertail!

wedding.content_full: I had my wedding reception at the Roostertail 10 years ago, with Shawna as the planner. Once again Shawna came through for us. She took my feedback and planned everything to the smallest detail. Anytime I needed anything she responded immediately. We did a very different kind of party this time, and just as before it couldn't have gone smoother.I can't recommend them more.As far as venues go, it is a classic and refined atmosphere (makes me think of the big band era) and they take great care of you. And, as someone who loves to eat, they deliver on food better then any other venue that I've attended for a wedding.5 stars

wedding.author: Michelle McFarland
wedding.content_full: What a joy it was to attend The Wedding Shoppe's 25th Anniversary Christmas Celebration at the Roostertail! For 25 years, our team has been focused on making brides' dreams come true, always celebrating their special moments. But this evening was different – it was our turn to celebrate together, and the Roostertail made it absolutely perfect.There was something magical about seeing our entire team dressed up and enjoying each other's company, rather than bustling about helping brides find their perfect gowns. We spend our days creating special moments for others, and the Roostertail team clearly understood how meaningful it was for us to finally have our own celebration.The venue was stunning, but what truly made the evening exceptional was the incredible Roostertail staff. Their warmth and attentiveness showed in every detail, and the food was absolutely outstanding! It was clear they put as much care into making our celebration special as we put into helping our brides find their dream dresses.To the entire Roostertail team: thank you for giving us an unforgettable evening where we could step away from being the celebrators and actually be the celebrated. After 25 years of creating magical moments for others, you helped us create a beautiful moment of our own. You gave us the perfect space to reflect on our journey, celebrate our achievements, and most importantly, enjoy each other's company.This wasn't just an anniversary party – it was a chance for our team to come together and celebrate the thousands of dreams we've helped come true over the past quarter century. The Roostertail provided the perfect backdrop for such a meaningful milestone, and we couldn't be more grateful for their exceptional service and attention to detail.

wedding.content_full: The Roostertail is incredible!! I just got married there (ceremony and reception) and everything was like a dream. Nicole is the most amazing wedding coordinator and she is so attentive! We must have asked her a million and one questions and she answered them all! The staff was able to make our mid-pandemic wedding safe and fun for everyone by moving our wedding to the gorgeous outdoor side patio, offering table service for drinks, and doing a plated dinner rather than a buffet. Everyone was in proper PPE (mask, gloves) and all of our tables were socially distanced. Did I mention the view? Being right on the Detroit river is breath-taking and the cool breeze is unbeatable. We could not have asked for a more magical experience. Thank you so much to everyone at the Roostertail for making our wildest wedding dreams come true!

wedding.author: Valerie Ruffino
wedding.content_full: On September 5th, 1970 we were excited to host our wedding reception at the Roostertail. At that time, only big stars appeared there. *They did not cater until years later.Fast forward 50 years to September 5th, 2020 and again we were excited to host our Anniversary Dinner at the Roostertail.We were assigned Na’shelle Hill. She was exactly what this stubborn 70 year old needed!! Nashelle was extremely patient with me as I knew exactly what I wanted. But Covid happened and I became anxious on how our special occasion could occur. When offered the outside patio instead of our original Marine Room...I knew in my heart it wasn’t going to work. But it did work...and actually was told by several family members that the outside venue was just perfect for our 50th Anniversary Dinner!! The tables were set in Gold and White...the weather was picture perfect...the view of the river was amazing!!And the food...OMG!!...totally a high class chef!! Thank you to Mike Schoenith, owner/operator and Na’shelle Hill, event coordinator to making Our 50th Anniversary Dinner into an incredible evening we won’t forget!!

uncategorized_sample.author: Michelle Poupard
uncategorized_sample.content_full: Bravo!! 👏🏼 Roostertail and everyone involved went above and beyond for our Employee party! Nicole, our main coordinator, was amazing and you can tell she thoroughly enjoys her job shown by her positivity and enthusiasm. We have been planning together since July and she always was quick to respond and manage all of our needs. The day of the party, Nicole always checked up on us and stayed until the end making sure everything was perfect! We also got to meet the owner and his son who were very welcoming and thankful. We met Chef, in which the food he prepared was so tasty and cooked to perfection! To our surprise, they had their beautiful water feature turned on that is seen through windows surrounding the DJ stage. It was a wonderful display and all our guests loved it! Lastly, the woman’s bathroom is a site to see on its own!! All the woman were taking pics/selfies in there all night! I would highly recommend Roostertail to anyone looking for a class act venue with a one of a kind location right on the Detroit River!
